payload.title: [MEDIUM] Sync-push replay amplification: O(N) re-read + full replay, no batch cap
payload.description: Interim /api/sync/push (server.js:838-879) reads the whole log twice and full-replays on every accepted push; only bound is express 5mb. Inflate the log then single-event pushes => quadratic CPU/disk, pins the 512mb node for all tenants. FIX: per-push event-count cap, read log once, incremental replay.
